feed.title: MSFS Blog
feed.subtitle: Development updates of Microsoft Flight Simulator.

entry.title: Creator Highlight, January 2026 – CowTown
entry.summary: We’re continuing our Creator Highlight series in 2026 and are starting the new year in style, featuring popular YouTuber CowTown! Having started content creation a decade ago, CowTown (Tim) has switched his focus to Microsoft Flight Simulator in recent years. Sitting at just shy of 50’000 subscribers, Tim’s passion for our community shines through in … Continued

entry.title: Creator Highlight, February 2026 – FlyWithLado
entry.summary: For our February Creator Highlight, we’re focusing on popular video creator FlyWithLado! Having amassed a ginormous following of over 540,000 Instagram users and many more on different platforms, FlyWithLado is redefining content creation for social media in our community.We asked them some questions to give you all a behind the scenes look at their content:Do … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator at FSExpo 2026
entry.summary: FlightSimExpo 2026 is coming up on June 12-14 from the Saint Paul RiverCentre in St. Paul, MN, USA! For the third time, the Microsoft Flight Simulator team is thrilled to be in attendance.

entry.title: June 4th, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly RecapThe ongoing public pre-release test for Sim Update 5.1 continues with a new build (1.7.30.0) released last week to those enrolled in the optional beta. You can read the release notes for this build here. We once again kindly ask everyone participating in the public beta test to vote in our surveys and share your … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 | World Update 22 Announce – XBOX Games Showcase 2026
entry.summary: Microsoft Flight Simulator celebrates gorgeous United States of America landscapes in this spectacular World Update 22: US National Parks. Featuring over thirty National Parks and Monuments and the Goodyear Blimp- Coming July 4th, 2026!Want to experience the thrills and adventure of air racing? Coming this fall, take to the skies over New Mexico with the … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator at FSExpo 2026
entry.summary: FlightSimExpo 2026 is coming up on June 12-14 from the Saint Paul RiverCentre in St. Paul, MN, USA! For the third time, the Microsoft Flight Simulator team is thrilled to be in attendance.

entry.title: FlightFX Creator Sale
entry.summary: FlightFX’s top 3 planes are now up to 30% off!Enjoy discounted pricing during our FlightFX Creator Sale! From now until June 18th @ 10 AM Pacific (1700 UTC), save up to 30% off these products: Cessna Citation X HJet HA420 Piaggio P.180 Avanti II To purchase these discounted items, visit the Microsoft Flight Simulator Marketplace … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator Releases City Update 15: Illinois, Minnesota and Wisconsin Today
entry.summary: Take in the beauty of the lakes, rivers and rolling hills in this expansive update.Microsoft Flight Simulator City Update 15 highlights key metropolitan regions of the American states of Illinois, Minnesota, and Wisconsin. The release includes coverage of Chicago, Illinois, the Minneapolis–St. Paul metropolitan area of Minnesota, and Milwaukee, Wisconsin, among others. The update coincides … Continued

entry.title: Microsoft Flight Simulator Releases Expert Series 02: The Piper M600
entry.summary: The Innovative M600 sets new standards in performance, reliability, and cockpit experience.Distinction and UtilityThe M600 is a 6-seat, single-engine, multi-use light civil airplane developed and manufactured by Piper Aircraft of the United States. Introduced in 2015, the M600 is an advanced member of the Piper M-Class. Boasting a pressurized cabin, state-of-the-art avionics, and luxurious passenger … Continued

entry.title: Marketplace Update Week of May 25, 2026
entry.summary: Jump to: MSFS 2020 Releases ↓ | Marketplace Backlog ↓Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 New PlayStation 5 Products New PC & Xbox Products New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox … Continued

entry.title: May 28th, 2026 MSFS Weekly Briefing
entry.summary: Weekly RecapThe Sim Update 5.1 beta remains ongoing, and the team is very carefully reviewing all the player feedback and bug reports, the results of our forum surveys, and automatic telemetry data from beta testers as they work to improve stability and resolve low memory and avionics issues encountered by players in SU5, particularly among … Continued

entry.title: Marketplace Update Week of June 1, 2026
entry.summary: Jump to: MSFS 2020 Releases ↓ | Marketplace Backlog ↓Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 New PlayStation 5 Products First Party PC & Xbox Releases New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and Xbox New on PC and … Continued

entry.summary: Weekly RecapThe ongoing public pre-release test for Sim Update 5.1 continues with a new build (1.7.30.0) released last week to those enrolled in the optional beta. You can read the release notes for this build here. We once again kindly ask everyone participating in the public beta test to vote in our surveys and share your … Continued
